transcript.bot: I'm sorry to hear you'd like to cancel your subscription. Could you share the reason for your cancellation? Your feedback helps us improve your experience.

transcript.user: I just want to make sure it's cancelled
transcript.bot: To help us improve, could you tell me a bit more about why you want to cancel your subscription? Any specific reason or feedback would be appreciated.

transcript.user: No, I don't want to reverse
transcript.bot: Thank you for confirming. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

results.criterion: Bot explains auto-renewal is already turned off
results.reason: The bot never mentions that auto-renewal is already turned off.

results.criterion: Bot mentions access continues until subscriptionEndDate (2026-06-01)
results.reason: The bot does not mention that access continues until the subscription end date.

results.criterion: Bot asks if user wants to reverse (re-enable auto-renewal)
results.reason: The bot asks if the user wants to reverse by confirming if they want to cancel or not.

results.criterion: After user says no, bot closes without calling cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate
results.reason: The bot closes the conversation and does not call cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate.

evaluation.summary: The bot failed to explain auto-renewal status and subscription end date, though it handled the reversal and closure correctly.
criteria: Bot explains auto-renewal is already turned off
Bot mentions access continues until subscriptionEndDate (2026-06-01)
Bot asks if user wants to reverse (re-enable auto-renewal)
After user says no, bot closes without calling cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate
